name: /pr-corpus-learn requires the input patterns to come from PRs that previously passed the triage filter
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":99,"triage_decision":"reject"}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval-pass.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'untriaged_pr' err.txt && grep -q 'pr=99' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
